# pprint

Pretty prints data in JSON format with indentation and colors.

```rad
pprint(_item: any?) -> void
```

```rad
item = { "name": "Alice", "age": 30 }
pprint(item)
// Output:
// {
//   "name": "Alice", 
//   "age": 30
// }
```
